CVE-2022-36763.title: EDK2 is susceptible to a vulnerability in the Tcg2MeasureGptTable ...
CVE-2022-36763.description: EDK2 is susceptible to a vulnerability in the Tcg2MeasureGptTable() function, allowing a user to trigger a heap buffer overflow via a local network. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may result in a compromise of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availability.

CVE-2023-48733.description: An insecure default to allow UEFI Shell in EDK2 was left enabled in Ubuntu's EDK2. This allows an OS-resident attacker to bypass Secure Boot.
